text.value: The ImplementationGuide uses package ee.fhir.mpi#1.1.1 released on 2024-07-30, but the most recent appropriate version is 1.2.1. This reference is getting old and the more recent version should be considered

The code 'Osaline' differs from the correct code 'osaline' by case. Although the code system 'https://fhir.ee/CodeSystem/toovoime-liik|0.2.2' is case insensitive, implementers are strongly encouraged to use the correct case anyway
